title: Critical-feedback rule in CLAUDE.md
goal: Add a short "Working style" section to the project CLAUDE.md instructing Claude not to blindly agree and to give honest, including critical, feedback.

steps.title: Add "Working style" section to CLAUDE.md
steps.detail: New ## Working style section in the project CLAUDE.md with two English instructions: don't blindly agree with proposals; give honest, including critical, feedback.

steps.title: Place it without clashing with language rules
steps.detail: Section sits separately from the Project language block so behavioral guidance isn't mixed with the English-only program-text rules; wording stays consistent with the file's tone.

steps.title: Wrap up and checks
steps.detail: Re-read the section in context; confirm it's valid English and reads cleanly.
